subcodes.first_line: O faithful friend! What thou didst write became known and understood. Praise be to God that the friends of God in that place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار باوفا آنچه نگاشتی معلوم و مفهوم گشت الحمد لله که دوستان الهی در محل
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
